zh.lifeSummary: 當Pierre Ier des Barres於1170年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易諾時，他的父親Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres40歲，母親Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry26歲。他於1186年與Agnes de La Guerche在法國i萊-德-福朗斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1235年4月享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pierre Ier des Barres于1170年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易諾时，他的父亲Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres40岁，母亲Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry26岁。他于1186年与Agnes de La Guerche在法国i萊-德-福朗斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1235年4月享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: topographic name from Westphalian dialect dūs ‘pile, decay’.

variants.name: Duis
meanings: North German and Dutch: from a personal name derived from the name Theodorus (see Theodore ) or from a personal name based on the ancient Germanic element theud ‘people, race’.

nameMeanings.name: Barres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: unexplained. This surname, which originates from Eich in Rhineland-Palatinate, is rare in Germany.
French (southern) and Catalan: from a derivative of Occitan and Catalan barda, Old French barde ‘pack-saddle’.
French (Bardès): habitational name for someone from any of several minor places called Bard, from the Gaulish element barro ‘height, hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Pierre Ier des Barres was born in 1170, in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France, his father, Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres, was 40 and his mother, Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, was 26. He married Agnes de La Guerche in 1186, in Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in April 1235, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pierre Ier des Barres est né en 1170, à Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de La Guerche en 1186, à Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en avril 1235, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pierre Ier des Barres 1170 in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres 40 und seine Mutter Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry 26. Er hat 1186 in Île-de-France, Frankreich Agnes de La Guerche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb im April 1235 im Alter von 65 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre Ier des Barres è nato il nel 1170 nel Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de La Guerche nel 1186, nel Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel aprile 1235, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pierre Ier des Barresが1170年にフランスピカーディオイゼノイオンで生まれた時，父Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barresは40歳，母Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitryは26歳であった。1186年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスでAgnes de La Guercheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1235年4月に65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pierre Ier des Barres(이)가 1170년 프랑스 피카디 이스 노욘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1186년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스에서 Agnes de La Guerche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1235년 4월 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre Ier des Barres nasceu em 1170, em Noyon, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de La Guerche em 1186, em Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em abril de 1235, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pierre Ier des Barres родился в 1170 г. в местности ноен, оис, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de La Guerche в 1186 г. в местности iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер апрель 1235 г. в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pierre Ier des Barres nació en 1170, en Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Agnes de La Guerche en 1186, en Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en abril de 1235, a la edad de 65 años.
